subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! He Who was promised in the tongue of God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, hath verily come. Say: O concourse of the heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین قد اتی من کان موعودا بلسان الله المهیمن القیوم قل یا ملا الغافلین
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
